Hero.title: Kubika Indimi z’e Kivu hakoreshejwe AI
Hero.description: KivuLingua iri kubaka datasets z’amajwi n’indimi kugira ngo indimi zacu ziboneke muri AI kandi zibikwe ku gisekuru kizaza.

community.description: Abavuga Ishi kavukire basanzwe bari mu gikorwa cyo kubika no kwemeza ururimi.

languages.description: Indimi za Kibantu zo mu Burasirazuba bwa Congo ziri mu mushinga.

audio.description: Amasaha menshi y’amajwi meza ateganyijwe ku datasets za ASR na TTS.

open.description: Datasets zifunguye kandi zigenzurwa n’abaturage ku bushakashatsi bwa AI y’indimi.
